pdg_node.statement: (signal: 1D numeric array, rest: ndarray | list | dict) -> tuple[numeric scalar, numeric scalar]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Parse the rest parameter (array, segment indices, or dict) to extract the mean and standard deviation of the baseline rest signal, zero-centering if needed.

pdg_node.statement: (signal: 1D numeric array, mean_rest: numeric scalar, std_dev_rest: numeric scalar, threshold_scale: positive numeric scalar) -> tuple[1D numeric array, numeric scalar]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Compute the scalar detection threshold as mean_rest + threshold_scale * std_dev_rest, and zero-centre the input signal by subtracting its mean.

declaration.name: compute_detection_threshold
declaration.type_signature: (signal: 1D numeric array, mean_rest: numeric scalar, std_dev_rest: numeric scalar, threshold_scale: positive numeric scalar) -> tuple[1D numeric array, numeric scalar]
declaration.docstring: Compute the scalar detection threshold as mean_rest + threshold_scale * std_dev_rest, and zero-centre the input signal by subtracting its mean.

declaration.name: compute_detection_threshold
declaration.type_signature: (signal: 1D numeric array, mean_rest: numeric scalar, std_dev_rest: numeric scalar, threshold_scale: positive numeric scalar) -> tuple[1D numeric array, numeric scalar]
declaration.docstring: Compute the scalar detection threshold as mean_rest + threshold_scale * std_dev_rest, and zero-centre the input signal by subtracting its mean.

declaration.name: compute_detection_threshold
declaration.type_signature: (signal: 1D numeric array, mean_rest: numeric scalar, std_dev_rest: numeric scalar, threshold_scale: positive numeric scalar) -> tuple[1D numeric array, numeric scalar]
declaration.docstring: Compute the scalar detection threshold as mean_rest + threshold_scale * std_dev_rest, and zero-centre the input signal by subtracting its mean.

pdg_node.informal_desc: Apply the Teager-Kaiser Energy Operator (TKEO) to the zero-mean signal and full-wave rectify the result, producing a non-negative energy envelope for each interior sample.

declaration.name: compute_tkeo_test_function
declaration.docstring: Apply the Teager-Kaiser Energy Operator (TKEO) to the zero-mean signal and full-wave rectify the result, producing a non-negative energy envelope for each interior sample.

declaration.name: compute_tkeo_test_function
declaration.docstring: Apply the Teager-Kaiser Energy Operator (TKEO) to the zero-mean signal and full-wave rectify the result, producing a non-negative energy envelope for each interior sample.

declaration.name: compute_tkeo_test_function
declaration.docstring: Apply the Teager-Kaiser Energy Operator (TKEO) to the zero-mean signal and full-wave rectify the result, producing a non-negative energy envelope for each interior sample.

pdg_node.statement: (tf_list: 1D numeric array, threshold: numeric scalar, active_state_duration: positive integer) -> tuple[list of integer sample indices, list of integer sample indices]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Run a stateful two-phase finite-state machine over the TKEO energy envelope to detect onset indices (rest→active transitions) and offset indices (active→rest transitions), enforcing minimum active-state duration before confirming each event.

declaration.name: detect_onsets_and_offsets
declaration.type_signature: (tf_list: 1D numeric array, threshold: numeric scalar, active_state_duration: positive integer) -> tuple[list of integer sample indices, list of integer sample indices]
declaration.docstring: Run a stateful two-phase finite-state machine over the TKEO energy envelope to detect onset indices (rest→active transitions) and offset indices (active→rest transitions), enforcing minimum active-state duration before confirming each event.

declaration.docstring: Run a stateful two-phase finite-state machine over the TKEO energy envelope to detect onset indices (rest→active transitions) and offset indices (active→rest transitions), enforcing minimum active-state duration before confirming each event.

pdg_node.statement: (onset_time_list: list of integer sample indices, offset_time_list: list of integer sample indices) -> 1D integer array
pdg_node.informal_desc: Combine detected onset and offset sample indices into a single sorted, deduplicated array of event indices using a union operation.
